args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" >/tmp/replay-proof-build.txt
printf '%s' "$(cat /tmp/replay-proof-build.txt)" | grep -q 'realization_mode='
grep -q 'same_requested_plan_requires_same_result_artifact_identity' "$bundle_dir/replay_proof.json"
grep -q 'replay proof:' "$bundle_dir/explain.txt"
replay_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- replay --bundle "$bundle_dir")
printf '%s' "$replay_out" | grep -q 'replay proof:'
printf '%s' "$replay_out" | grep -q 'realization_mode='
printf 'replay-proof\n'
